label: capability search • run shell script
notes: Tracking-only. `sandbox_exec` is excluded from the search index by ToolIndexService.syncFromRegistry (runtimeManagedToolNames). No recall fix — BM25, embedder, or threshold — can rescue this case while the indexer-side exclusion stays. Resolution requires either un-excluding sandbox tools from the index or rewriting the case to target an indexed tool. Excluded from recall_floors.json on purpose.
